content.en:
Qinglian Master!

Silver Demon Master!

Master of the Stygian Sea!

White-bearded old man!

......

One by one, these Eternal Masters appeared, some in their own bodies and some in their incarnations.

It was about the Black Silent Sea, and they couldn't ignore it, if they were invaded by the Black Silent Sea to the Void Region, then the Void Region would be in trouble.

Last time, a moment of negligence allowed the Black Silent Sea to drill a hole in the Void Region, and in the end, several Eternal Masters joined forces to seal the hole and stop the invasion of the Black Silent Sea.

That must never happen again.

When they came to the Black Silent Sea, they saw an incredible scene.

I saw that the black sea was pouring into Ye Tian's body.

No, it's not pouring out, it's devouring.

"Endless Lord!"

The white-bearded old man exclaimed.

He was shocked that the turmoil in the Black Silent Sea was actually caused by Ye Tian.

The Qinglian controller also knew Ye Tian, but at the moment they were extremely confused.

Immediately, they entered the void area and asked Ye Tian's body, but they did not disturb Ye Tian in the Black Silent Sea.

And Ye Tian also knew that the Qinglian controller was coming, so he immediately appeared and met with them.

"I've seen all the masters!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Endless Lord, what's going on in the Silent Sea?"

The Qinglian controller couldn't help but ask.

Ye Tian said lightly: "It's just that I'm cultivating a secret technique." "

Secret art!

Although they guessed it, they didn't expect it to be true.

Moreover, what a secret technique could devour the Black Silent Sea, even the Eternal Controller couldn't help the Black Silent Sea, but Ye Tian was only a half-step Eternal Controller, but he did it.

Such a secret technique must be amazing.

At this time, Ye Tian no longer had the mark of the Ten Elements Ancestor on his body, because he was already a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, so the inheritance mark on his body was naturally withdrawn.

The Blue Lotus Controller and the White-bearded Old Man knew that Ye Tian had a relationship with a great being and had obtained the inheritance of the other party, but they didn't know that Ye Tian had successfully apprenticed.

And some Eternal Controllers didn't know Ye Tian's situation at all, and only thought that Ye Tian was a very powerful half-step Eternal Controller, so they had a crooked mind.

"Endless Lord, this kind of secret art is too wasteful to put on you as a half-step Eternal Master, leave it to me. "

The Silver Demon Master commanded.

"Silver Devil!"

The Stygian Master frowned and shouted.

"Why, I asked the Half-Step Eternal Master for a secret technique, do you have to stop me?" the Silver Demon Master said coldly.

Just as the other Eternal Masters were about to say something, Ye Tian said in a deep voice, "Silver Demon Master, do you want to find death?"

"What, you dare to talk to me like that?"

The Silver Demon Master was furious.

What is he, the Eternal Master, in the Boundary River, he is the object of worship of countless living beings, and there are several half-step Eternal Masters under his command, and he can pinch a piece of the Half-step Eternal Master to death with one hand.

Half-step Eternal Master, who saw him not respectfully?

"White beard, you are not allowed to stop it, and the others should not stop it, for the sake of the same void area, I will not kill him, but I have to teach him a lesson, then seal you for 100 million realms of river years. "

The Silver Demon Master said arrogantly.

Immediately.

The two fought.

The white-bearded old man opened his mouth, but still didn't make a move.

First, he didn't want to offend the Silver Demon Controller, and second, he felt that Ye Tian's strength was not necessarily weaker than that of the ordinary Eternal Controller, and the strength of the Silver Demon Controller was not very strong.

Of course, if Ye Tian is really defeated at a critical moment and is about to be sealed, he will still make a move.

But he was soon confused, and so were the other Eternal Masters.

The battle ended in an instant, and ended in a crushing defeat for the Silver Demon Master.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian took out the Hundred Realms Stick and blasted away with one blow and a thousand kills.

After being transformed by the Ten Elements Ancestor, the Hundred Realms Stick was already a median control realm soldier, and its power was terrifying.

In addition, Ye Tian's current strength was much stronger than when he killed the Godless City Lord, so the Silver Demon Controller was not his opponent at all.

Boom!

The Silver Demon Controller was knocked away by Ye Tian's blow, and his body pierced through layers of time and space, and he was almost knocked out of the Void Zone.

And at this moment, the Silver Demon controller was miserable, a piece of the armor of the Realm Control Soldier on his body had been cracked, and half of his body had been annihilated.

Such an injury can be regarded as a serious injury!

"Median Realm Controller, how can you, a half-step Eternal Master, have a Median Realm Soldier?"

The Silver Demon Controller was shocked.

When he saw his defensive control realm soldier armor, his heart ached even more.

The white-bearded old man was also shocked, he knew that Ye Tian's Hundred Realm Stick was obviously a lower-level control boundary soldier before, although it was a top-level lower-level control boundary soldier, but it was much worse than a median control boundary soldier!

Now, this lower-level realm control soldier has suddenly become a mid-level realm master.

Moreover, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than he imagined.

"If you weren't the eternal master of the Void Region, you'd be dead by now!" Ye Tian said coldly to the Silver Demon Master.

The Silver Demon Master's face changed many times, and finally lowered his head and apologized.

"Endless Lord, I'm sorry. "

There is no way, the strength is not as good as others, Ye Tian has not yet become the eternal controller, he is more powerful than him, if he waits for Ye Tian to become the eternal controller, it will be too easy to pinch him to death.

The master of the Stygian Sea laughed loudly: "Endless Lord, you are too powerful, even the Silver Demon is not your opponent, with your strength, I am afraid that you can easily become the eternal master, if you have time, you can come to me as a guest!"

"Definitely!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Then, all the Eternal Masters left, and even the Qinglian Masters left.

The white-bearded old man stayed and chatted with Ye Tian for a long time, but he didn't ask about the secret technique and why he wanted to devour the Black Silent Sea.

He's not stupid, and naturally there's a lot of concealment involved, so he can leave it unasked.

After a long time, the white-bearded old man also left.

In the following days, Ye Tian kept devouring the Black Silence Sea, making the Black Silence Sea smaller and smaller, and the Black Silence Sea was completely out of the void area.

Under the rules of the Void Zone, the previous cave healed itself, and there was no need for the Boundary to be sealed.

Another long period of time passed, and at this moment, Ye Tian had already devoured a hundred boundary river years.

There is no way, the Black Silence Sea is too big, so it is quite laborious to devour the Black Silence Sea with Ye Tian's cultivation.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian successfully devoured the Black Silent Sea.
